# pihole_dns_record (Resource)

Manages a local DNS record in PiHole.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "pihole_dns_record" "example" {
  domain = "myhost.lan"
  ip     = "192.168.1.100"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `domain` (String) The domain name.
- `ip` (String) The IP address to resolve to.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Composite ID in format domain:ip.
